src/wiki/lint-page.ts.note: line-range-drift (auto-fix expands citations to enclosing chunk) and repeated-broad-citation (warns when the same range is reused across numbered steps) are in tension. Running wiki_lint_batch(fix: true) on tight per-step trace citations widens them to chunk boundaries and then trips repeated-broad-citation. Phase 1's intent is to keep tight citations, so prefer leaving line-range-drift warnings on numbered step prose rather than auto-fixing them. Auto-fix is safe on architecture/tunables/single-cite paragraphs.
src/wiki/lint-page.ts.author: agent
